ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANTS DAVID DEMO AND SUSAN DEMO'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR FEES, COSTS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST HENRIETTA MARTIN AND HER ATTORNEY OF RECORD HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS DAVID DEMO AND SUSAN DEMOS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR FEES, COSTS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST HENRIETTA MARTIN AND HER ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS DENIED, IN PART AND GRANTED, IN PART. (1) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NOS. 1 - 44 IS DENIED. IT APPEARS FROM THE PAPERS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS PRODUCED ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS AND IS WITHHOLDING NONE BASED UP THE OBJECTIONS STATED IN HER RESPONSE. (2) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NOS 45, 46 & 46(A) ARE OVERRULED AND FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES WILL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. (3) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER A VERIFICATION OF ALL HER SUPPLEMENTAL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND BASED ON AN ASSUMPTION THAT PLAINTIFF WILL COMPLY, DEFENDANT' MOTION IS DENIED AS TO NOS. 6, 8, 28, 31, 43, 55, 64, 66, 67, 68 & 69. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER A RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 7. PLAINTIFF HAS SUPPLEMENTED HER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 31, 32, 33 & 344. TO THE EXTENT THAT ANY OF THE RESPONSES ARE OTHER THAN UNQUALIFIED ADMISSIONS, PLAINTIFF WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WILL PROVIDE TO DEFENDANT THE INFORMATION CALLED FOR BY FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1. (4) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS. 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, 2.6, 9.1, 17.1 & 50.2. (5) MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,500.00 WITH PAYMENT TO BE MADE TO DEFENDANT AND THEIR COUNSEL WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: KATHRYN LLOYD, CSR #5

Defendants David Demo And Susan Demo'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Fees, Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Henrietta Martin And Her Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Catherine Weiderhold, Esq. (415-533-0735) for Henrietta Martin, Plaintiff an opposing party.
Davin Bacho, Esq. (415-981-5411) of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa, LLP. for David Demo, Defendant and moving party.
Court Reporter: Kathryn Lloyd, CSR #5955, (415-948-8289), Reported. (D501)

9:30 am
Court orders Partiesto meet and confer in the hallway.
10:10 am
ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants David Demo And Susan Demos' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses, Production Of Documents And Request For Fees, Costs And Monetary Sanctions Against Henrietta Martin And Her Attorney Of Record is DENIED, in part and GRANTED, in part. (1) Motion to Compel Further responses to request for Production of Documents Nos. 1 - 44 is denied. It appears from the papers that Plaintiff has produced all responsive documents and is withholding none based up the objections stated in her response. (2) Plaintiff's objections to Request for Production Nos 45, 46 & 46(a) are overruled and full and complete responses will be provided to defendant within twenty (20) days from the date of this order. (3) Plaintiff is ordered to serve within twenty (20) days from the date of this order a verification of all her supplemental discovery responses and based on an assumption that Plaintiff will comply, Defendant' motion is denied as to Nos. 6, 8, 28, 31, 43, 55, 64, 66, 67, 68 & 69. Plaintiff is ordered to serve within twenty (20) days from the date of this order a response to Special Interrogatory No. 7. Plaintiff has supplemented her responses to Defendant's Requests for Admission Nos 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 31, 32, 33 & 344. To the extent that any of the responses are other than unqualified admissions, Plaintiff within twenty (20) days from the date of this order will provide to Defendant the information called for by Form Interrogatory 17.1. (4) Plaintiff is ordered to serve within twenty (20) days from the date of this order full and complete responses to Form Interrogatories Nos. 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, 2.6, 9.1, 17.1 & 50.2. (5) Monetary sanctions are assessed against Plaintiff in the amount of $2,500.00 with payment to be made to defendant and their Counsel within ten (10) days from the date of this order. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Kathryn Lloyd, CSR #5955, (415-948-8289), Reported. (D501)
